name: jak-shield
description: Universal MCP security gateway. Every AI tool call passes through Shield first — input/output scanning, prompt-injection detection, PII redaction, deterministic policy engine, human-in-the-loop approvals, and full audit trail.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key (optional)
openai_api_key.description: Enables the AI risk classifier. JAK Shield works deterministically without it.

field_encryption_key.title: Field encryption key (64 hex chars)
field_encryption_key.description: AES-256-GCM key for credentials at rest. Generate with: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"

corporate_domains.title: Corporate email domains (comma-separated)
corporate_domains.description: Email domains treated as 'internal' — anything else is 'external' and triggers PII review.
